content: Read remaining sections of AddItem.jsx (1180-2118) to fully understand UI surface
Design sealed public API for uploadItems.js: start(files, opts), getSnapshot, subscribe, useUploadItems hook
Create /app/frontend/src/lib/uploadItems.js — extract pipeline (continueInteractive, analyzeCard, saveAll, pendingAutoSave logic, buildCreatePayload)
Rewrite /app/frontend/src/pages/AddItem.jsx as thin shell (~300 LoC) consuming useUploadItems(); drop bulkInfo branching; drop full-field per-card editor (keep only inline edits)
Verify: ESLint + esbuild + screenshot smoke (1 photo / 5 photos / 7+ photos)
Update plan.md with Phase U1 + U2 completion notes
